title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: A mathematics education video exploring how logarithmic transformations of complex numbers can be applied to understand and reconstruct Escher's Print Gallery artwork. The video connects conformal maps from complex analysis to practical image manipulation, drawing on foundational work by de Smit and Lenstra.
